name: Cherry Olives- Pickled
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cherries thoroughly.
2. Pack the cherries into clean jars.
3. Pour the solution (made from 1 pint of water, 1 tablespoon of salt, and 1 tablespoon of sugar) into the jars to cover the cherries completely.
4. Store in a cool place.
NOTE: No heating or cooking is required. Keep the pickled cherries in a cool place.
